nasb.text: So he consented, and began seeking a good opportunity to betray Him to them apart from the crowd.

esv.text: So he consented and sought an opportunity to betray him to them in the absence of a crowd.

cnv.text: 他答應了，就尋找機會，要趁群眾不在的時候，把耶穌交給他們。

ccb.text: 犹大同意了，便伺机找百姓不在的场合将耶稣交给他们。

csbs.text: 犹大同意了，就开始找机会，要趁众人不在的时候，把耶稣交给他们。
